title: Add free transform tool for moving and resizing diagram elements

requirements.text: Implement a free transform tool that allows users to select and move both icons and their associated text labels together as a single unit on the AttackPathCanvas

quotes: move the icons and text label

acceptanceCriteria: Users can click to select an icon and its text label as a grouped unit
Dragging a selected icon moves both the icon and its text label together
The transform tool maintains the relative position between icon and label during movement
Multiple icons can be moved individually with their respective labels

requirements.text: Add resize functionality to the free transform tool that allows users to scale icons on the diagram using corner and edge handles

quotes: can resize the icons on the diagram

acceptanceCriteria: Selected icons display corner and edge drag handles for resizing
Dragging corner handles resizes icons proportionally
Dragging edge handles resizes icons along one axis
Resized icons maintain their visual quality and aspect ratio when appropriate
The resize functionality preserves the icon's position on the canvas

requirements.text: Create visual feedback for the free transform tool showing selection state, including a bounding box or selection outline around selected icons and their labels
acceptanceCriteria: Selected icon and label display a visible selection indicator (bounding box or outline)
Selection state is clearly distinguishable from unselected state
Transform handles are only visible when an element is selected
Users can deselect by clicking on empty canvas area

constraints: Maintain compatibility with existing AttackPathCanvas functionality including connections, drawings, and image upload
Do not modify the backend/main.mo file or diagram state structure
Preserve existing icon drag-and-drop functionality from the toolbar
Keep the existing undo/redo system working with transform operations
nonGoals: Rotation of icons or text labels
Multi-select or group selection of multiple icons
Transform tools for connections, drawings, or other diagram elements
